creator: eischen@vigrid.com
text:
GNAT does not build properly on an ELF system and it is out of
date with the latest public release of GNAT (3.11p).

GNAT needs GNAT to build.  It is not possible to build an ELF
version of GNAT with an aout version of GNAT.  You need to first
build it as an aout->elf cross compiler, and then use the cross
compiler to build an elf->elf version of the compiler.  I've done
this and produced an elf->elf version of GNAT that can be found
in ftp://ftp.cdrom.com/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/gnat-3.11p-elf.tgz
(pkg_add format).  You must install this in order to build an elf
version of GNAT.

The diffs to the port are enclosed.  Note that the following files
have been deleted by this upgrade:

  files/5finmaop.adb
  files/5ftaprde.adb
  files/5ftimope.adb
  patches/patch-freebsdgcc
  patches/patch-gnat

There is one new file:

  patch-freebsdgcc28

Fix: I can supply the complete files for this port if necessary.

Install the package ftp://ftp.cdrom.com/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/gnat-3.11p-elf.tgz
and apply this patch to the current gnat port:
How-To-Repeat: NA
